hero.description:
Be unique. Create your own design. > 
Your clothing is your message. 
With our personalization tool, you can create more than just simple clothing – you create your own style icon. 
T-Bode: Your designs – your story.

heroAnim.line2: T-shirt, hoodie or cap – make your own style right now. Your clothing is your message to the world.

about.title: T-Bode is a place where a T-shirt becomes a story.
about.description: In our stores in Riga, Latvia, you can visit us in person, try on a T-shirt, choose the color and size, and submit your design or idea – we'll take care of the rest. We use modern DTF (Direct to Film) technology for vibrant colors on both light and dark fabrics.

quality.title: Premium DTF Print Quality
quality.desc: Vibrant, durable, and high-quality prints using Direct-to-Film (DTF) technology.

tool.title: Easy-to-Use Design Tool
tool.desc: Effortlessly create your own custom designs with our intuitive built-in builder.

production.title: Fast Production
production.desc: With a large on-site warehouse, we guarantee quick manufacturing and order processing.

delivery.title: Convenient Delivery
delivery.desc: Get your order delivered smoothly to any Omniva parcel machine.

s1.title: Choose a Product
s1.desc: Select from our catalog of t-shirts, hoodies, and mugs.

s2.title: Personalize It
s2.desc: Customize your item using our built-in design tool.

s3.title: Place Your Order
s3.desc: Complete your checkout and pay securely online.

s4.title: Receive Your Order
s4.desc: Collect your item from any Omniva parcel machine within 1-2 business days.

about.howItWorksDesc: Four simple steps to your unique custom product

stores.title: Visit T-BODE
stores.subtitle: Our Stores in Riga Shopping Centers
stores.pickup: Orders can be picked up at the T-Bode office: Braslas iela 29, Entrance D, Riga
stores.officeDesc: Pick up your orders in person at our office in Riga, Braslas iela 29, Entrance D.

contact.title: Looking to outfit your team or planning an event?
contact.subtitle: Contact us directly for competitive pricing on large-scale orders.
contact.attachFile: Click to attach a file (PDF, PNG, JPG, AI, EPS, SVG)
contact.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 15 MB.
contact.successMessage: Your request has been submitted successfully!
contact.errorMessage: Error submitting the request. Please try again.
contact.thankYouDesc: We will get back to you shortly.

products.designDesc: Choose a blank product, then personalise it with your own design using our editor.
products.collectionDesc: Ready-made designs inspired by Latvia — grab your favourite and go.

productDetail.customizeDesc: Use our visual editor to add your own text, images, and designs to this product.
productDetail.zakekeNote: Zakeke integration will be connected here.

checkout.loginError: Please sign in to place an order

auth.registerSuccess: Check your email to confirm your account!

footer.brandDesc: SIA Ervitex — manufacturer of personalized clothing and accessories in Latvia. Create your unique design or choose from our collection.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products and services

payment.successDesc: Thank you for your order. We'll start processing it right away.
payment.successDescGuest: Thank you for your order! A confirmation and invoice (if applicable) has been sent to your email.
payment.createAccountHint: Want to track your order? Create an account with the same email.

cookies.title: Cookie Usage
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and ensure website functionality. By continuing to use this site, you agree to the use of cookies.
